div.style: margin: 2px; display: inline-block; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background: #f5f5f5; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.3s ease; width: 140px; height: 105px; vertical-align: top; position: relative;
cursor: pointer; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;

a.style: text-decoration: none; display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%;

img.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 6px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; display: block;

div.style: display: none; width: 100%; height: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f5f5f5; color: #999; font-size: 12px; text-align: center;

position: absolute; top: 4px; right: 4px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8); color: white; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 8px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 4px; z-index: 10; line-height: 1;
position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 4px; right: 4px; height: 3px; border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(233, 236, 239, 0.9); z-index: 10;

position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 4px; background: rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.8); color: white; width: 16px; height: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 8px; line-height: 1; z-index: 10;

position: absolute; bottom: 4px; right: 4px; background: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.8); color: white; width: 16px; height: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 9px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 1; transition: all 0.2s ease; z-index: 10;
display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; background: transparent; min-height: 40px; width: 100%; max-width: 100%;
